calls.notes: Axios instance issues PUT /api/documents/:id/tags with JSON body { tags: string[] }. Request interceptor attaches Authorization: Bearer <token> from localStorage if present.

Mounted at /api/documents in index.js (line 93). Requires auth via composite middleware (JWT, session, or API key) unless DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true. Validates tags is an array; filters to non-empty strings; rejects if > 10 tags.

calls.method: pool.query — UPDATE documents_v2 SET tags WHERE id
calls.notes: Returns RETURNING id, tags. Responds 404 if no row matched. Responds 400 if tags not an array or > 10 items. Responds 500 on DB error.

calls.method: DocumentGrid.setState — patch documents[] and close modal
calls.notes: On success: maps over this.state.documents[], replaces the matching document (by id) with { ...d, tags: tagEditorTags }, sets tagSaving=false and tagEditorVisible=false. On catch: sets tagSaving=false only; tagEditorVisible remains true so the user can retry.
